mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_time) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_notice_read nr ON n.id = nr.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.status = '1' AND n.deleted = 0 AND nr.id IS NULL

SELECT n.id FROM sys_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_notice_read nr ON n.id = nr.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.status = '1' AND n.deleted = 0 AND nr.id IS NULL ORDER BY n.is_top DESC, n.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
